title: autobench.rsi.completed v1
description: Emitted when an RSI run finishes (any termination reason). Summarises the full run outcome including score progression, convergence reason, and optional promotion status. Source: /autobench.

final_score.description: Final aggregate benchmark score at the last completed iteration.

initial_score.description: Aggregate benchmark score measured at iteration 0 (baseline).

n_iterations_actual.description: Number of RSI iterations actually completed.

convergence_reason.description: Why the run terminated. max_iters=hit iteration cap; early_exit=manual stop; budget_halt=cost/request budget exhausted; converged=improvement below threshold.

total_cost_usd.description: Optional. Total estimated cost in USD across all LLM calls for this run.

promoted.description: Optional. Whether the best harness from this run was promoted to the production slot.

benchmark_source.description: Optional. Identifier for the benchmark suite or dataset used (e.g. 'tsp-eil51', 'sdf-mixed').
